# Add Documentation Feature

Add new documentation, agent definition, or instruction file.

## Requirements
- Feature: {{feature}}
- Scope: {{scope}}

## Workflow
1. Architect plans documentation structure
2. Doc Writer creates the content
3. Doc Reviewer validates quality and accuracy
4. Manager confirms completion

## Quality Standards
- Valid Markdown syntax
- Clear and concise content
- Consistent formatting
- All links work
- Cross-references to related documents
